feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Total Value Not Maching on Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Customer has given the price with 3 decimal places like 0.123 & system is not accepting 3 decimals places thats why total value is not maching with the customer's PO. Please suggest how to do the same?

 

Regards

Shivang Singhal

entry.title: Customer non valuated parts provided for production
entry.content:
We need to repair a machine for the customer. This machine article number is generally set up as a valuated material in our system, where each machine also gets a serial number. We would like to set up this process as kind of parts provided scenario where the customer send us the material and we perform some activities via production order. The material provided by customer should be non valuated in our system (no valuated stock, no invoice received). The customer in the end pays for the repair.


We would like to perform the repair via production order and not via the repair process in service - because the production team is also responsible for this process - there is no dedicated service team. We do not want to create a new non valuated article (machine) as we loose track of the serial number.

entry.title: When user places cursor on Cost Center / Profit Center, description should appear (like tooltip)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In Post cash journal app we have below 2 requirements.

  1. When user places cursor on Cost Center / Profit Center, description should appear.
  2. When payment to Employee using cash journal, employee number should appear in one column so that it would be easier for reconcile.

Regards,

SGN

entry.title: Why attachment option is not there during create incoming invoice
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am not getting any such attachment option in the app "Create incoming invoice", where as in FB02 I can attach, but I want that attachment option fecilitated in create incoming invoice app.

regards,

Amit

entry.title: Feasibility Request – MRP Behavior for Reservations and PR Approval Status (Reorder Point Planning)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We would like to check the feasibility of certain client-specific requirements related to MRP behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (Reorder Point Planning).

1. Exclusion of Open Reservations from Available Stock Business Requirement:
During MRP execution, quantities in open reservations (where goods issue has not yet been posted) should not be considered as available stock.

Example:

  • Total stock: 100
  • Open reservations: 20
  • Expected available stock for MRP: 80
  • MRP should generate procurement proposal for 20

2. Exclusion of Unapproved Purchase Requisitions Business Requirement:
MRP should exclude purchase requisitions that are not yet approved and only consider approved PRs as incoming supply.

Request:

Kindly confirm:

  • Whether the above requirements can be achieved in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
  • If any SSCUI, configuration, or standard functionality supports this.
  • Whether any in-app extensibility (e.g., BAdI) is available to control this behavior.
  • If not possible, please confirm whether this is a standard limitation.

We appreciate your guidance on this. 

Best regards

entry.title: How Asset wise depreciation details can be seen from schedule run
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How Asset wise depreciation details can be seen from schedule Depreciation run.

I have executed App "Schedule Asset Accounting Jobs " in the out put no Asset wise details are present.

Currently it is not showing data asset wise. Our client want to see that list.

entry.title: MM Period Issue
entry.content: We have recently gone live and not finalized Mar Period, In May the Mar period will automatically close. We need to keep this period open till end of May

entry.title: Validation before putaway while creating task for Automatic bin determination
entry.content: Could you please clarify which enhancement point or BAdI can be used to implement custom bin filtering logic (e.g., bay load validation) during automatic bin determination in warehouse task creation, as /SCWM/EX4_CORE_PTS_FILT_EMP is not triggered in this scenario?

entry.title: Cannot post intercompany billing due to billing date
entry.content:
We created an STO and posted GR in 01.05.2026.
The current date is 29.04.2026.
Then when we created billing document, the system generated an error: Document cannot be posted for the date 20260501, date should be less than 20260501

Can anyone know the reason?
Please let me know.
Thank you.

entry.title: Managing Mixed Fiscal Year Variants on SAP Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently designing an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (SAP Cloud ERP) template for a group structure with 4 company codes. However, we face a challenge regarding the fiscal year setup.

We have two different fiscal calendar needs within the same tenant:

  • 2 company codes should use the standard calendar fiscal year
    (January 1 – December 31, e.g. K4)

  • 2 company codes should use an academic / non-calendar fiscal year
    (September 1 – August 31)

Current Limitation in CBC

As far as we understand, in Central Business Configuration (CBC), when defining company codes within the same organisational structure / country setup, the system does not allow assigning different fiscal year variants to the created company codes.

  1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, what is the recommended best practice to manage company codes requiring different fiscal year variants in the same landscape?

  2. Is the intended approach to keep the leading ledger (0L) on calendar year and use an Alternative Fiscal Year Variant with a non-leading ledger for the academic-year company codes?

  3. If yes, what are the functional limitations of this design for:

    • Group Reporting / Consolidation

    • Asset Accounting

    • CO / Controlling periods

    • Project System / Budgeting

    • Year-end closing activities and special periods (13–16)

  4. If different fiscal year variants are fundamentally required at company code level, does this mean separate tenants / separate CBC projects would be necessary?

Objective

We would like to understand the clean-core / standard-supported architecture before finalizing the implementation design.

Any guidance from experts who managed mixed fiscal calendars in Public Cloud would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

SAP Central Business Configuration SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Requirement for uploader against this app - Enter Asset Transaction: Transfer Within Company Code
entry.content:
User needs an uploader(To Mass update/Insert Data) against this app - "Enter Asset Transaction: Transfer Within Company Code".
User required all field which are available while creating the asset.
To achieve this requirement user provided us some reference link which are below mentioned
https://api.sap.com/search?searchterm=asset&tab=All&refinedBy=true

Requesting SAP Team, to please check and update us if this requirement can be fulfilled through any standard configuration or any sort of customization.

entry.title: Customer has overdue items pending but still delivery is being allowed
entry.content:
• Credit check simulation shows “Percentage 0% of overdue open items under 0% ( days)” (Message no. UKM_CHECK035) even though overdue open items exist.
  • Credit check is passed for the items although there are overdue open items for the customer.
  • Credit check step 130 Check for Overdue Open Items is not able to block the customer items although the open items are overdue for the customer.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Batch Number Creation for Process Order in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Strictly in Public Cloud - I have a requirement where custom batch number needs to be assigned in Process Order creation screen for Co - Product, By product and for Order Material.

Is it possible to assign the Batch code by suppressing the internal N/R with the criteria maintained in Z table. For example,  i maintain for material POLYMER as "PL" in z table. And my batch code is assigned as PL0426 (04 is current month & 26 is current year).

I need clarification whether this modification can be done using BADI at COR1 - Create process order, COR2 - Change Process Order, COR6N - Confirmation Order, MIGO - Post Goods movement.

If anyone had done this enhancement, please drop a reply.

Thanks & Regards,

Pranay Teja K.

entry.title: Workflow Processor Not Displayed for Sales Order
entry.content:
We have identified a situation where the workflow processor is not displayed in the approval workflow for a Sales Order Without Charge in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Observed behavior
The approval workflow is triggered, but the Processors section is blank
The message “No users found for task” appears in approval details
The workflow is cancelled automatically
The sales order is not visible in Manage Sales Orders apps, but can still be accessed via display transactions (e.g., VA03 equivalent)


Context
Multiple workflows are active for sales orders
One workflow has no start condition (generic)
Another workflow has specific conditions (e.g., approval reason for Free of Charge orders)


Question
Why does the system trigger the incorrect workflow scenario?
How does SAP determine which workflow is executed when multiple workflows are active?
What is the correct way to avoid this issue?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud: “Enter value in permitted format” error in Pricing Elements – Flexible Analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

When trying to run the “Pricing Elements – Flexible Analysis” app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public edition), we receive the following error:

For characteristic 2CLXSC0SW771A5B1VRWY89H9WG9, enter value in a permitted format

This issue was observed in multiple systems (e.g. DEV and TEST). In some cases, the app also shows no data.

We verified that:

  • The underlying CDS query is available
  • The app loads but fails upon execution

Has anyone encountered this issue before or can advise on how to troubleshoot it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Project with Revenue with don´t see to edit Settlement Rules
entry.content:
In the Enterprise Project with project Profile: Project with Revenue with don´t see to edit Settlement Rules (not appear) in the app Project Control - Enterprise (1NT).

How can result this topic?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Closing individual WBS elements in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I have a question regarding the project closure process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Is it possible to set the status of individual WBS elements to "Closed" or "Technically Completed" (TECO) while keeping the rest of the project active? I am looking to manage project completion at a granular level rather than waiting to close the entire project at once.

Thanks in advance for your insights.

entry.title: Journal Entry Bulk Clearing – Error /AIF/MES/233 (No recipient assigned)
entry.content:
Although the inbound service works correctly and the request is processed for API Journal Entry Clearing (Asynchronous) Confirmation (Outbound SOAP service) the outbound confirmation message is not being triggered.

In Message Monitoring, the following error is observed:

No recipient assigned (/AIF/MES/233)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Recipient Business System ID in outbound SOAP message - SAP COM 0223
entry.content:
Good morning,

For outbound message from SAP COM 0223 we need to include the Recipient Business System ID, but have been unable to find the correct setting to include this.

Based on documentation this should be the same as the Business System set in the Communication System.

Is it possible to set this information in this communication arrangement?

entry.title: Requirement for a solution to Mass Update Asset Master Data
entry.content:
We need a solution that will allow to edit the "UL in Years" in "Valuation" Tab in the "Manage Fixed Assets" app at mass scale, since there're more than 2000 assets having a wrong entry in these fields, we need a solution where we can point out this particular field and edit its value against the asset number.

As shown in below screenshot, users have used the "Migrate Your Data" App to mass upload the Asset Data.
In the Valuation Section, the UL in Years is mistakenly uploaded as 4 under the Depreciation Area 15, the same is happened with around 2000 Assets, which needs to be edited at mass scale, editing manually each and every asset is time consuming so we're looking for an automated solution where this particular fields data can be edited.
